content: Just as the educational definition of reflexion frames it as a metacognitive practice where language learners reflect on their own writing output to identify gaps and refine understanding, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can borrow this structured, language-centered pedagogical framework to train small, domain-specialized LLMs to correct output errors without large-scale reinforcement learning from human feedback. This reframes LLM self-reflection not as a novel technical innovation, but as a formalization of the reflexive learning humans have used in literacy education for decades.
